text:
Once upon a time in the sleepy town of Whimsey, there lived a peculiar cat named Whiskerwyrm. Whiskerwyrm was infamous among the townsfolk for his never-ending adventures. He loved exploring the cobblestone streets during the odd hours of dawn and dusk, seeking treasures lost or forgotten by others.

One day, Whiskerwyrm discovered an ancient book buried under an abandoned pumpkin patch. The pages were dusty, smelling musty, but the cover was vibrant, adorned with pictures of magical creatures and forgotten spells. As he flipped through it, his eyes landed on a spell that promised to grant him three wishes.

Weeks turned into months as Whiskerwyrm diligently practiced his new spell. He would stand under the full moon, close his eyes, and whisper:

"Tee-hee! I wish for courage as a lion!"

Suddenly, he felt stronger, more confident. He might've spoken like a lion after all!

His next wish was for
